pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing the production brief in setup_task.sh and verifier.py logic, which explicitly tests frame assembly, fps changes, audio addition, and montage creation.
Verified by task requirements which involve video/audio editing pipelines and tools.
Web search confirmed SOC 27-1014 maps to Special Effects Artists and Animators (formerly Multimedia Artists and Animators in the 2010 SOC version).
Verified contextually via the stop-motion commercial scenario in setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task normally downloads real public domain footage (Big Buck Bunny) and a real water stream sound from Google, which are converted into 120 image frames and a 10s WAV file by setup_task.sh. If the network fails, it generates completely synthetic mandelbrot visuals and pink noise as fallbacks. The verifier.py strictly enforces the exact durations and properties for the deliverables based on mathematical frame counts: the 120 frames at 12 fps produce a 10s master video, at 24 fps produce a 5s cinematic video, and a 12-frame preview at 2 fps produces a 6s video. The SOC code 27-1014 correctly corresponds to Special Effects Artists and Animators (previously known as Multimedia Artists and Animators).
